description.en: Stop a running cloud agent. This pauses the agent's execution without deleting it. Stopped agents cannot be resumed.
description.de: Stoppe einen laufenden Cloud-Agenten. Dies pausiert die Ausführung des Agenten, ohne ihn zu löschen. Gestoppte Agenten können nicht fortgesetzt werden.
description.es: Stop a running cloud agent. This pauses the agent's execution without deleting it. Stopped agents cannot be resumed.
description.fr: Stop a running cloud agent. This pauses the agent's execution without deleting it. Stopped agents cannot be resumed.
description.ro: Stop a running cloud agent. This pauses the agent's execution without deleting it. Stopped agents cannot be resumed.
description.it: Stop a running cloud agent. This pauses the agent's execution without deleting it. Stopped agents cannot be resumed.

vars.API_KEY: env:CURSOR_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cursor Dashboard at https://cursor.com/settings/api

description.en: Unique identifier for the cloud agent to stop (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.de: Eindeutige Kennung für den zu stoppenden Cloud-Agenten (z.B. 'bc_abc123').
description.es: Unique identifier for the cloud agent to stop (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.fr: Unique identifier for the cloud agent to stop (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.ro: Unique identifier for the cloud agent to stop (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.it: Unique identifier for the cloud agent to stop (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
